description_long: This is a pair of aviator-style sunglasses featuring large, teardrop-shaped lenses with a deep blue tint. The frame is thin and metallic, with a double bridge design that adds both structural support and a classic aesthetic. The temples are slender and straight, curving gently at the ends to fit securely over the ears. The nose pads are visible and appear to be adjustable, providing comfort and stability for the wearer. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with no visible embellishments or branding. The lenses have a reflective, glossy finish, enhancing their stylish and modern appearance.
description: Aviator sunglasses with blue-tinted, reflective lenses and a thin, metallic double-bridge frame. Sleek, minimal design with adjustable nose pads and straight temples.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, blue-tinted lenses, double bridge, and adjustable nose pads.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, straight temple and the profile of the lens and frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the temples and the back of the lenses and frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and the slim profile of the frame.
attribute_frame_design: Aviator shape with large, teardrop lenses and a thin, full-rim metallic frame. Features a double bridge and straight, slender temples with gentle ear curves. Minimalist and classic with no decorative embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: Deep blue tint with a reflective, mirrored effect. The lenses appear uniformly colored and moderately transparent.
attribute_bridge_style: Double bridge design with a thin, straight upper bar and a lower bar connecting the lenses. Adjustable nose pads are attached to the bridge for comfort.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, curving slightly at the ends for a secure fit. No visible patterns, engravings, or embellishments.
